description_long: This object represents an elderly person with a slender build, featuring exaggeratedly elongated limbs and a hunched posture. The head is detailed with short, curly gray hair and a pale complexion, while the face is marked by prominent wrinkles and the presence of glasses. The figure is dressed in a long, dark, form-fitting garment that covers the entire body, with no visible patterns or accessories. The arms and legs are unusually extended and thin, giving the figure a surreal, almost abstract appearance. The hands and feet are not clearly defined, blending into the elongated limbs. The overall visual impression is of an elderly individual with distinctive facial features and a unique, stylized body form.
description: A stylized elderly person with elongated limbs, short curly gray hair, glasses, and a long dark garment, hunched in posture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the elderly person's face with glasses, short curly gray hair, and the upper torso in a hunched position.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extreme length of the arms and legs, with the head turned slightly and the face partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear angled view emphasizing the back, the hunched posture, and the elongated limbs extending outward.
description_view_3: Back view showing the back of the head with curly gray hair and the extended limbs, with minimal facial detail visible.
attribute_clothing_style: Long, dark, form-fitting garment with no visible patterns or accessories.
attribute_posture: Hunched with elongated limbs, not standing upright.
